questions: I open the fridge, but ____________
I open the fridge, but it is empty
She wants to pass the exam, but ____________
She wants to pass the exam, but she doesn't study
He has a lot of money, but ____________
He has a lot of money, but he is not happy
We will go to the beach tomorrow, but ____________
We will go to the beach tomorrow, but the weather will be cold
They like the new restaurant, but ____________
They like the new restaurant, but it is very expensive
I want to call my friend, but ____________
I want to call my friend, but my phone is dead
The weather is sunny today, but ____________
The weather is sunny today, but it is very cold
My brother plays football every day, but ____________
My brother plays football every day, but he is not very good
She speaks three languages, but ____________
She speaks three languages, but she is shy to talk
We will buy a new car next year, but ____________
We will buy a new car next year, but we need to save money first
I study English every morning, but ____________
I study English every morning, but I forget the new words
The store is open now, but ____________
The store is open now, but I have no money
He wants to sleep, but ____________
He wants to sleep, but the baby is crying
I like coffee, but ____________
I like coffee, but it keeps me awake at night
They will travel to Spain, but ____________
They will travel to Spain, but they don't speak Spanish
She is very tired, but ____________
She is very tired, but she keeps working
We have a big house, but ____________
We have a big house, but we have no garden
I want to buy that shirt, but ____________
I want to buy that shirt, but it is too small
The movie starts at eight, but ____________
The movie starts at eight, but we will be late
He knows the answer, but ____________
He knows the answer, but he is afraid to speak
My sister loves animals, but ____________
My sister loves animals, but she is allergic to cats
